meaning: adj.语音的,语音学的,表示语音的
examples: This dictionary gives phonetic transcriptions of all headwords.
What is the phonetic symbol for each of the sound descriptions offered?
I am learning the International phonetic symbol while my mom is teaching.
Phonetic learning in the form of "synthetic phonics" is now a major part of education.
But the words can come in a phonetic English form, Chinese characters and even spoken form.
